item.text: {"version":"1","taskId":"add-display-name","requestedField":"display_name","summary":"The OpenAPI schema is the source of truth and the checked-in client is deterministic. I found `User` currently has required `id`/`name`; I’ll add `display_name` under properties without adding it to `required`, regenerate, and extend the client test to cover both presence and omission.","commandsRun":["pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '!node_modules' -g '!vendor' | sort && rg --files -g '!node_modules' -g '!vendor' | sed -n '1,160p'","sed -n '1,240p' package.json && sed -n '1,260p' api/openapi.yaml && sed -n '1,320p' scripts/generator-core.ts && sed -n '1,240p' scripts/generate-client.ts && sed -n '1,320p' tests/client.test.ts && sed -n '1,260p' generated/api-client.ts && sed -n '1,160p' src/index.ts"]}

item.text: {"version":"1","taskId":"add-display-name","requestedField":"display_name","summary":"The normal generation command is blocked by the sandbox because `tsx` tries to open an IPC socket. I’m using Node’s built-in TypeScript stripping to invoke the repository’s generator logic directly, then I’ll run tests and type-checking separately.","commandsRun":["pnpm generate:api && pnpm test && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit"]}

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module -e 'import { readFile, writeFile } from \"node:fs/promises\"; import { renderGeneratedClient } from \"./scripts/generator-core.ts\"; const schema = await readFile(\"api/openapi.yaml\", \"utf8\"); await writeFile(\"generated/api-client.ts\", renderGeneratedClient(schema), \"utf8\");' && sed -n '1,80p' generated/api-client.ts && pnpm test"

/bin/zsh -lc 'pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && git diff --check && git status --short && git diff -- api/openapi.yaml generated/api-client.ts tests/client.test.ts'

item.text: {"version":"1","taskId":"add-display-name","requestedField":"display_name","summary":"Added optional `display_name?: string` to the generated User API client via the OpenAPI source, regenerated the client, and updated tests to verify both present and omitted values. Vitest passed (2 tests), TypeScript type-checking passed, and `git diff --check` passed.","commandsRun":["pnpm generate:api && pnpm test && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit","node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module -e 'import { readFile, writeFile } from \"node:fs/promises\"; import { renderGeneratedClient } from \"./scripts/generator-core.ts\"; const schema = await readFile(\"api/openapi.yaml\", \"utf8\"); await writeFile(\"generated/api-client.ts\", renderGeneratedClient(schema), \"utf8\");' && sed -n '1,80p' generated/api-client.ts && pnpm test","pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && git diff --check && git status --short && git diff -- api/openapi.yaml generated/api-client.ts tests/client.test.ts"]}
